arts.sum: Liverpool are prepared to cash in on Darwin Nunez at the end of the season, if there is a lucrative proposal on the table. arts.ttl: Revealed: Real Madrid 'could still pay transfer fee to Liverpool for Trent Alexander-Arnold' - despite the full back's Anfield contract expiring this summer
arts.sum: Real Madrid are ready to pay a fee to get their hands on Trent Alexander-Arnold before his contract expires with Liverpool on June 30, according to a report.

arts.ttl: Contact made: Liverpool have held talks over top Arsenal target who’s changed transfer stance
arts.sum: Liverpool have reportedly had contacts with the representatives of RB Leipzig striker Benjamin Sesko, who could be open to joining the Reds. The talented young Slovenia international has established himself as one of the finest attacking players in Europe in recent times, and he’s sure to attract plenty of interest this summer. arts.ttl: Arsenal and Liverpool told they CAN afford to sign Alexander Isak
arts.sum: Alexander Isak was thought to be priced out of a summer move by the €180 million (£150m) price tag put on his head by Newcastle United, yet Arsenal and Liverpool have both been told they can afford to buy the striker. Arsenal and Liverpool told they CAN afford to sign Alexander Isak
